## new member

- site: <!-- your domain, e.g. https://example.com -->
- name used in members.json: <!-- e.g. "example" -->

## checklist

- [ ] my domain uses a non-Latin script (name, TLD, or both)
- [ ] my site is live and reasonably stable (not permanently "under construction")
- [ ] my site isn't malicious
- [ ] I added exactly one entry to `members.json`, matching the format already in the file
